title: Add API key authentication to SignalR /agent-hub
description:
## Problem
`WebUI.Blazor/AgentHub.cs` is mapped at `/agent-hub` with no authentication:
```csharp
app.MapHub<AgentHub>("/agent-hub");  // No auth gate!
```
Any client on the LAN can connect and receive real-time `StatusUpdated`, `ChatMessage`, and `GoalUpdate` events including bot position, health, inventory, and chat messages.

## Desired Outcome
SignalR hub requires the same API key as REST endpoints.

## Scope
- Add authentication check to `AgentHub.OnConnectedAsync` or middleware
- Reuse `ApiKeyMiddleware` pattern (validate `X-Api-Key` header on WebSocket upgrade)
- Return 401 for unauthenticated connections

## Non-Goals
- Adding OAuth/OIDC flow (overkill for local dashboard)
- Changing REST API authentication (already handled by ApiKeyMiddleware)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Unauthenticated WebSocket connection to `/agent-hub` returns 401
- [ ] Authenticated connection (valid `X-Api-Key` header) succeeds
- [ ] Unit/integration test verifies auth gate
- [ ] Dashboard continues to work with API key
